verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Satan you have no place in our lives, We're true sons of God we've got to stand for our rights; There isn't no enemy that can stand before us, If God be for us tell me who could be against us.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hate you're conquered, Malice you're conquered, Envy you're conquered, Conquered by the word of God, Lust you're conquered, Rebellion you're conquered, Disobedience you're conquered, Conquered by the word of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every day there's an enemy to face Whether it be home Or even at your work place; Please remain conscious And don't lose your focus, Keep your confidence in Him And don't lose your trust.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fear you're conquered, Doubt you're conquered, Confusion you're conquered, Conquered by the word of God, Women you're conquered, Money you're conquered, Popularity you're conquered, Conquered by the word of God.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh saints of like precious faith Take your positions for the hour is late, And though the enemy has posted many threats, We been made more than conquerors, Let's stand and take our place.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Sometimes in our lives Things for years that we fight There seems to be no way to end all this strife; Resist the enemy and He'll flee from you, He's only and bluff and that is all He can do.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Now it's time for the Mount Zion showdown, David fought for Israel, slew Goliath to the ground; Michael and Lucifer at war now to end, We've got the victory We'll crown Christ King of Kings
